prose:
**Computed result — Fukui reactivity for nitrobenzene.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui indices were computed with chemkit `fukui-reactivity` using DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`; `functional=b3lyp`, `basis=def2-tzvp`) in the **gas phase**, parent charge **0** and multiplicity **1**. Geometry: fixed, user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`; no geometry optimization was reported by this task. Population scheme: **Mulliken (PySCF)** finite-difference Fukui analysis. The tool used cation charge **+1**, multiplicity **2**, and anion charge **−1**, multiplicity **2**. Density fitting was not requested. Software/backend reported by the tool: `program=dft`; PySCF version was not reported in the returned JSON.

**Headline result:** the most electrophilic site is atom **4** (1-based label), symbol **C**, with **f+ = 0.49641782**. The most nucleophilic site is atom **5** (1-based label), symbol **C**, with **f− = 0.1072882**.

Per-atom Fukui results, in atom order from the XYZ (`O, O, N, C, C, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H, H`):

| Atom label | Element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.47317276 | 0.097015524 | 0.28509414 | 0.37615724 |
| 2 | O | 0.47344363 | 0.096773921 | 0.28510877 | 0.37666971 |
| 3 | N | -0.45670088 | 0.017243458 | -0.21972871 | -0.47394434 |
| 4 | C | 0.49641782 | -0.014292037 | 0.24106289 | 0.51070986 |
| 5 | C | 0.11562654 | 0.1072882 | 0.11145737 | 0.0083383373 |
| 6 | C | 0.11588205 | 0.10723661 | 0.11155933 | 0.0086454474 |
| 7 | C | 0.17412422 | 0.094922441 | 0.13452333 | 0.07920178 |
| 8 | C | 0.17422939 | 0.094892499 | 0.13456095 | 0.079336896 |
| 9 | C | 0.28913575 | 0.0083116096 | 0.14872368 | 0.28082414 |
| 10 | H | -0.23168969 | 0.075212029 | -0.078238832 | -0.30690172 |
| 11 | H | -0.23181693 | 0.075202557 | -0.078307186 | -0.30701949 |
| 12 | H | -0.13372477 | 0.083883283 | -0.024920743 | -0.21760805 |
| 13 | H | -0.13379393 | 0.083881905 | -0.024956011 | -0.21767583 |
| 14 | H | -0.12430597 | 0.072428004 | -0.025938984 | -0.19673398 |

**Warnings:** no `warnings` array was present in the returned chemkit JSON, so no warnings were reported by the tool result.

**Integrity:** `integrity.trustworthy = true`. Integrity checks returned by the tool were all `ok: true`:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

**Artifacts/provenance:** result JSON path from `cli_invocation`: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjaia9khy/live.json`. Plot path: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-190256_nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact command reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjaia9khy/live.json`. The chemkit API result did not return a live `.out` log path, so I cannot truthfully provide one.
